text.message: i dont care about that settle
just seems like a waste of your yop
to aggressively plow me for no reason instead of road settling
it seems like you care after all
well i care about the principle
Is there such a thing as an non aggressive plow?
i mean if it is actually good for your game its less aggressive
I don't have brick, I see no better use for yop
you still dont have a settle
Red has a city and gets road
This is for taking a settle spot from red
I try to catch up somehow
remind us how youre behind again green
OWS wins in the late game man
its not about what's happening at this exact moment in time
how it it even close for me lol
seriously explain how i could possibly have won last turn
